title: ProviderSecretRef
description: Schema for provider secret references — pointers to locally-stored credentials that identify providers without storing raw API keys, tokens, cookies, or environment dumps. Used by the provider pool policy and launcher to route workers to the correct local secret source. The actual secret value is never committed; only the reference metadata lives in the repo.

refVersion.description: Schema version. Current is 1. Increment when the schema shape changes.

providerId.description: Stable identifier for the provider this secret belongs to. Must match the provider id in provider-pool-policy.json and provider-pool.json.

sourceType.description: Where the secret is stored locally. env-var = environment variable, credential-manager = Windows Credential Manager, claude-settings = C:\Users\LENOVO\.claude\settings.json.

sourceKey.description: Lookup key within the source type. For env-var: the variable name (e.g. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). For credential-manager: the credential target name. For claude-settings: the settings path (e.g. apiKey). Never contains the actual secret value.

label.description: Human-readable label for this secret reference (e.g. 'Primary Claude credential').

capabilities.description: API capabilities this credential supports. Used by the provider selector to match workers to suitable providers.

isActive.description: Whether this secret reference is active. Set to false to temporarily exclude a provider without removing the reference.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this reference was created.

notes.description: Free-text notes. Must not contain actual secret values, tokens, or credentials.
